channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Build a search system in 2026: semantic, keyword
item.description: Cut search latency 50 % in 5 minutes — PostgreSQL 16, pgvector 0.7, and Redis 7.2 walkthrough with real 2026 benchmarks and cost breakdowns

item.title: Price a dev tool: 3 weeks of mistakes
item.description: Cut pricing mistakes 80% with seat vs usage data from 1,247 dev tool users in 2026. Learn the exact tiers, Redis scripts, and Stripe pitfalls that turned $2k MRR into $6.2k.

item.title: Build a portfolio that beats AI clones in 2026
item.description: Your React clone won’t beat AI assistants in 2026 — here’s how to ship under 2G constraints and prove it with hard numbers

item.title: Neon vs PlanetScale vs Turso: which broke first?
item.description: Cut API 500 errors 90% by fixing Neon, PlanetScale and Turso timeouts under real load — connection pools, replica lag and proxy limits exposed after 12 months in production.

item.title: pgvector replaced Pinecone for $8k/year
item.description: Cut $8k/year by replacing Pinecone with pgvector — real latency, cost, and recall numbers from 2 production systems in 2026. See how a 70% bill reduction and sub-50ms p99 latency became possible.

item.title: Slice monoliths slowly, not all at once
item.description: Cut API latency 75% by replacing strangler fig with sidecars — real benchmarks, Django-to-Go migration cost data, and the Unix socket trick most teams miss.

item.title: AI observability: why logs and traces lie
item.description: Cut AI hallucinations 80% with real observability metrics — embedding drift, attention entropy, and retrieval precision you can’t get from Prometheus alone

item.title: ORM 2026: Prisma vs Drizzle vs SQLAlchemy
item.description: Cut ORM cold-start latency 71% and save $1,200/month by dropping Prisma for Drizzle + raw SQL on Postgres 16 and Node 22. Migration safety over 2G, RAM under 512 MB, and type safety without runtime overhead.

item.title: API attacks rise 300% in 2026: what’s breaking first
item.description: Cut API overage 90% by capping CPU, memory, and Redis state. Real 2026 numbers from a 200k req/day service, Cloudflare Workers, Redis 7.2, and PostgreSQL 16.

item.title: Branching databases: my 2026 workflow fix
item.description: Cut local DB setup time 50% with Neon and PlanetScale branching — stop debugging `relation does not exist` errors and sync schemas in minutes.

item.title: Offline-first apps: 80% uptime in spotty networks
item.description: Cut loan submission failures 32% with offline-first SQLite + WorkManager — Android 13, SQLCipher 4.5.6, and client-side image resizing in 1.2s on Tecno Spark 8C.

item.title: Migrate Daraja 2.0 to production in 2 hours
item.description: Cut Daraja callback failures 97% in 2 hours: TLS 1.3, idempotency keys, and the 10-line retry wrapper most teams miss.

item.title: AI code debt: manual vs AI-generated
item.description: Cut production fires 60% with guardrails: manual vs AI-generated code in 2026. See the latency, cost, and error rate numbers that actually matter.

item.title: Bootcamp to $120k: 2026 steps that pay
item.description: From bootcamp to $120k ARR in 2026: the boring stack vs edge stack showdown with concrete costs, latency benchmarks, and the exact migration point most teams miss.

item.title: Build a Nairobi SaaS stack for $3.2k/month
item.description: Cut Nairobi SaaS costs 40% with this 2026 stack — exact Terraform, CI/CD, and RDS tuning that kept us under $3.2k/month at 5,000 users

item.title: 2026 technical screens: what actually works
item.description: Cut technical screen time 40% with a real feature flag service — Neon Postgres 3.4, Upstash Redis 7.2, Vercel Edge 32.5.4

item.title: Legacy code: revive it cheap with AI
item.description: It can simulate 1,000 user flows in minutes.

item.title: ARM in production: Graviton4 vs Ampere in 2026
item.description: Cut AWS costs 36% with Graviton4 — the real migration mistakes teams make, benchmarks, and the exact timeouts to change first

item.title: Prompt injection: your AI is leaking data now
item.description: Lose 14 AI incidents in 30 days with this 30-minute defense pipeline — prompt injection cheat sheet for 2026 systems using LangChain 0.2.5 and AWS Lambda.

item.title: AI interviews now ask for this
item.description: In our production systems at [redacted fintech], we saw a 37% increase in flaky tests after migrating to pytest 8.1 in Q3 2024.
